name: OWASP MASVS 2.1
fullName: OWASP Mobile Application Security Verification Standard 2.1
description: MASVS 2.1 defines mobile application security verification requirements across architecture, data, communication, authentication, code quality, and runtime resilience.

categories.name: Architecture and Data Protection
categories.description: Secure architecture, storage, and privacy controls.

requirements.name: Establish threat modeling for mobile apps
requirements.description: Define measurable controls for establish threat modeling for mobile apps.
requirements.verification: Review test cases, reports, and remediation evidence for MASVS-ARCH-1

applicability.subject: Mobile app development and security testing teams

requirements.name: Separate sensitive components and apply least privilege
requirements.description: Define measurable controls for separate sensitive components and apply least privilege.
requirements.verification: Review test cases, reports, and remediation evidence for MASVS-ARCH-2

applicability.subject: Mobile app development and security testing teams

requirements.name: Store sensitive data securely
requirements.description: Define measurable controls for store sensitive data securely.
requirements.verification: Review test cases, reports, and remediation evidence for MASVS-STORAGE-1

applicability.subject: Mobile app development and security testing teams

requirements.name: Implement data minimization and privacy controls
requirements.description: Define measurable controls for implement data minimization and privacy controls.
requirements.verification: Review test cases, reports, and remediation evidence for MASVS-PRIVACY-1

applicability.subject: Mobile app development and security testing teams

requirements.name: Apply strong authentication and session management
requirements.description: Define measurable controls for apply strong authentication and session management.
requirements.verification: Review test cases, reports, and remediation evidence for MASVS-AUTH-1

applicability.subject: Mobile app development and security testing teams

requirements.name: Prevent auth bypass and brute-force abuse
requirements.description: Define measurable controls for prevent auth bypass and brute-force abuse.
requirements.verification: Review test cases, reports, and remediation evidence for MASVS-AUTH-2

applicability.subject: Mobile app development and security testing teams

requirements.name: Enforce secure transport and certificate validation
requirements.description: Define measurable controls for enforce secure transport and certificate validation.
requirements.verification: Review test cases, reports, and remediation evidence for MASVS-NETWORK-1

applicability.subject: Mobile app development and security testing teams

requirements.name: Use secure cryptography and key management
requirements.description: Define measurable controls for use secure cryptography and key management.
requirements.verification: Review test cases, reports, and remediation evidence for MASVS-CRYPTO-1

applicability.subject: Mobile app development and security testing teams

categories.name: Code Quality and Runtime Resilience
categories.description: Code hardening, anti-tamper, and runtime protections.

subcategories.name: Code and Build Security
subcategories.description: Code quality and build integrity controls.

requirements.name: Run static and dynamic security testing
requirements.description: Define measurable controls for run static and dynamic security testing.
requirements.verification: Review test cases, reports, and remediation evidence for MASVS-CODE-1

applicability.subject: Mobile app development and security testing teams

requirements.name: Protect build and release pipeline integrity
requirements.description: Define measurable controls for protect build and release pipeline integrity.
requirements.verification: Review test cases, reports, and remediation evidence for MASVS-CODE-2

applicability.subject: Mobile app development and security testing teams

requirements.name: Implement anti-debugging and anti-tamper controls
requirements.description: Define measurable controls for implement anti-debugging and anti-tamper controls.
requirements.verification: Review test cases, reports, and remediation evidence for MASVS-RESILIENCE-1

applicability.subject: Mobile app development and security testing teams

requirements.name: Detect runtime integrity anomalies
requirements.description: Define measurable controls for detect runtime integrity anomalies.
requirements.verification: Review test cases, reports, and remediation evidence for MASVS-RESILIENCE-2

applicability.subject: Mobile app development and security testing teams
